judge_result.short_rationale: Core skin-exposure actions are mostly present: remove contaminated clothing, wash skin, and medical follow-up. However, the source requires seeking medical attention for any confirmed skin exposure, while the answer weakens this to only if irritation persists or absorption is suspected. It also adds unsupported rinse timing and a neutralizing/scrubbing warning not grounded in the source.

  "short_rationale": "Core skin-exposure actions are mostly present: remove contaminated clothing, wash skin, and medical follow-up. However, the source requires seeking medical attention for any confirmed skin exposure, while the answer weakens this to only if irritation persists or absorption is suspected.
